name: io.github.bbb-build/mascope-mcp
description: World MiniApp reviews and analytics powered by verified humans. Every review is backed by World ID proof-of-personhood.

tools.name: search_miniapps
tools.description: Search World MiniApps by keyword, category, or sort criteria. Returns verified ratings and user metrics.

tools.name: get_app_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific MiniApp including rank, user metrics, and trend data.

tools.name: get_app_reviews
tools.description: Get World ID-verified reviews for a MiniApp with ratings, comments, and distribution.

tools.name: get_trending_apps
tools.description: Get trending World MiniApps sorted by growth rate with sparkline data.

tools.name: get_category_analytics
tools.description: Category breakdown with app count, total weekly users, and top apps per category.

tools.name: compare_apps
tools.description: Compare 2-5 World MiniApps side by side on rank, users, opens, rating, and trends.
